name: Spiced Cocoa Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, 1/4 teaspoon of cinnamon, mace, and salt.
2. In a large bowl, beat the sugar and butter until creamy. Add the egg; beat well.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture to the sugar mixture, alternating with milk, mixing until well combined. Form into a ball of dough.
4. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Use a floured 2 1/2-inch doughnut cutter to cut the dough into rings.
5. If needed, reroll any excess dough and repeat the cutting process.
6. Fry the doughnuts in batches in hot fat (375°F) for about 30 seconds on each side, turning once with a slotted spoon. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
7. Repeat the frying process if necessary.
8. In a small bowl, stir together the powdered sugar and a dash of ground cinnamon. Sprinkle over the warm doughnuts before serving.
